Movie Details

Domestic Releases: November 25th, 2009 (Wide) by Weinstein Co.
Video Release: May 25th, 2010 by Sony Pictures Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R For some violence, disturbing images and language
Running Time: 111 minutes
Plot point: Cannibalism, Death of a Spouse or Fiancée / Fiancé, Road Trip, Suicide, Young Child Dealing with the Death of a Parent
Social setting: Post Apocalypse
Subgenre: Survival Drama
Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Drama
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Science Fiction
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
